PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO VACATE ORDER OF SANCTIONS ISSUED ON 6/11/2002 TO ANTHONY L. HEAD, ESQ., IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00, IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE OR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. SANCTIONS ARE ORDERED VACATED. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WITHIN FIVE DAYS.
